name: Alaska Bake
recipeIngredient: 175 g Gruyere or Edam cheese (thinly sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat the oven to 190°C, 375°F, Gas mark 5.
2. Drain the canned salmon and mix the juice with water for fish stock until it reaches a total of 150 ml / ¼ pint.
3. Break the salmon into large chunks and arrange it with the broccoli in one or four individual ovenproof dishes.
4. In a saucepan, combine the fish stock, white wine, parsley, and cornflour. Blend until smooth.
5. Heat gently, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens.
6. Pour the sauce over the salmon and broccoli.
7. Arrange the cheese slices over the top of the dish.
8. Bake for 20 minutes or until the cheese has melted. Serve immediately.
Serves 4. Approx. 395 kcals per serving
